shorts.hook: Building two businesses while raising kids?
shorts.content: Passion and purpose can grow side by side when you align your business with your values. You can successfully balance motherhood and business ownership when your work feels meaningful.
shorts.title: How to build businesses that align with your mom life

shorts.hook: Your kids need this more than screen time
shorts.content: Sensory-rich learning and outdoor play are essential for children's development in today's digital world. Creating connections to nature and rhythm helps children develop authentic relationships with themselves and others.
shorts.title: Why outdoor play beats screen time every time

shorts.hook: The invisible work that builds community
shorts.content: Building community requires invisible labor that often goes unrecognized but creates lasting impact. Purpose-driven businesses that serve community needs can thrive while making a difference.
shorts.title: The unseen work behind every thriving community

shorts.hook: Family bonding doesn't have to be forced
shorts.content: Family bonding happens naturally when parents and children engage in shared learning experiences. Brooke's work is rooted in connection — to nature, to rhythm, and to the soul of childhood.
shorts.title: The secret to natural family bonding moments

titleOptions.curiosityGap: What happens when you build businesses around your kids?
titleOptions.boldStatement: She built two thriving businesses without sacrificing motherhood
titleOptions.numberBased: 2 heart-centered businesses + motherhood = this success story

description:
Building two successful businesses while raising kids seems impossible — until you hear Brooke Briggs' story of aligning passion with purpose.
Discover how this educator-entrepreneur created thriving ventures centered on children's development while navigating the beautiful chaos of motherhood.

🎯 KEY TAKEAWAYS:
• Passion and purpose can grow side by side when you align your business with your values
• Building community requires invisible labor that creates lasting impact
• Sensory-rich learning and outdoor play are essential for children's development
• You can balance motherhood and business when your work feels meaningful
• Creating connections to nature helps children develop authentic relationships
• Family bonding happens naturally through shared learning experiences
• Purpose-driven businesses serving community needs can thrive

🌱 CONNECT WITH BROOKE:
Learn more: https://www.farmschooloc.com/

📝 FULL SHOW NOTES: https://themanageher.com/blog/brooke-briggs-on-creating-children-s-music-meaningful-work-motherhood
📊 TAKE THE QUIZ: https://themanageher.com/blog/brooke-briggs-on-creating-children-s-music-meaningful-work-motherhood

🎙️ SUBSCRIBE to The Manage Her® Podcast for weekly leadership insights that help ambitious women thrive in business and life.

#WomenLeadership #MomEntrepreneur #PurposeDrivenBusiness #TheManageHer #WomenInBusiness #BusinessMom #Leadership #Entrepreneurship #WorkLifeBalance #ChildDevelopment

communityPosts.content:
What's your biggest challenge as a mom entrepreneur?

A) Finding time for business growth
B) Managing mom guilt about working
C) Balancing family needs with business demands
D) Creating systems that work with kids around

Brooke Briggs shared incredible insights about building two heart-centered businesses while raising kids — her secret? Aligning your work with your values so it doesn't feel like you're choosing between motherhood and success. 🌱✨

"Brooke's work is rooted in connection — to nature, to rhythm, and to the soul of childhood." 🌿

In our latest episode, educator-entrepreneur Brooke Briggs shares how she built two thriving businesses centered on what matters most: meaningful connections and child development.

Her journey proves that when your business aligns with your values, you're not sacrificing motherhood — you're modeling purposeful living for your children.

What would change if you aligned your work completely with your values? 💭

pinnedComment: What resonated most with you from Brooke's journey? Whether you're a mom entrepreneur or dreaming of starting something meaningful, her story shows that purpose-driven businesses can thrive alongside motherhood. 🌱 Get the full insights + take our leadership quiz here: https://themanageher.com/blog/brooke-briggs-on-creating-children-s-music-meaningful-work-motherhood
